title: Fan-Out Worker Pool
description: Implement a fan-out worker pool pattern in Go. The first line of input is 'workers=N' specifying the pool size. The remaining lines are integers. Use N goroutines as workers to compute the square of each integer concurrently, then return all squares sorted in ascending order.
constraints: First line: workers=N (integer, number of goroutines in the pool)
Remaining lines are integers to be squared
Use a worker pool pattern with channels
Return squares sorted ascending, one per line

examples.explanation: Three workers process the squaring tasks concurrently. Results (1,4,9,16,25) are collected and returned sorted ascending.

test_cases.description: 3 workers computing squares of 1-5, sorted output
